headline: Result and My Trips now surface save, return, and next-step actions much earlier in the first mobile screen.
notes: My Trips now includes a compact first-fold utility strip with live saved/recent/shared counts and direct re-entry actions for resume, saved routes, and shared-link import.
The result top section now exposes Save Trip, Open My Trips, and Share actions before the user scrolls, so the loop feels actionable right away on mobile.
A compact helper note was added under the result hero actions to reinforce why saving to My Trips matters for reopening the same city logic later.
Mobile spacing and button grids were tightened so both surfaces feel lighter and more legible in the first screen.
